fileName: Ceratotherium simum simum (Rhinocéros blanc du Sud) - 385.jpg
alt: Southern white rhinoceros in grassy savanna habitat
caption: Open grasslands with water and mud wallows support healthy rhino populations.
acquisitionNotes: Core article image curated separately from the rhinoceros gallery set.
